route.name: Mojave Solitaire
route.description: Public GPX Mojave route with remote desert roads, sand, washboard, pavement connectors, and long exposed sections.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX Mojave route with remote desert roads, sand, washboard, pavement connectors, and long exposed sections.
route.bestSeason: Cool season route; July heat is a blocker.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX Mojave route with remote desert roads, sand, washboard, pavement connectors, and long exposed sections.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Water is sparse and must be planned source-by-source; caches may be required.
resources.food: Carry all food except any confirmed route-adjacent services.
resources.camping: Desert camping and land rules must be checked for the exact itinerary.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before gate confirmation.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Archive as a cool-season California idea with real GPX.
Do not present as next-weekend ready.
Use only after a full desert water and weather plan.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control gate confirmation.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

review.decision: promote to plan_ready source coverage only; gate status remains blocked until date-specific gates pass
